chunks.text: Student research projects to be highlighted at Data Science Showcase - EECS at Berkeley The Data Science Showcase, which will highlight the amazing ways that students are using data science to advance discovery and impact across campus and beyond in over 30+ projects, will be held this Thursday, December 5, from 12 noon to 3:30 pm in Sutardja Dai Hall. The Showcase will kick off with a series of presentations in the Banatao Auditorium, followed by posters, demonstrations, and light refreshments in the adjoining Kvamme Atrium. RSVP requested. Categories Education Research Students View Open Faculty Positions
